title: Clear Glass Cylinder Vase 40cm x 15cm Extra Large Thickened Crystal Vase for Flowers Floral Arrangement for Centerpieces Living Room, Kitchen, Office, Wedding
features: 【Perfect for artistic decoration】This large glass vase with 3 different size (40*15cm, 30*12cm, 25*10cm) work perfectly as meditation accessories to make you relaxed and create aesthetic room decor in different stylel. Perfect art decoration for your home, kitchen, dining room, living room, bedroom, office, restaurant, flower shop.

【High Quality & Elegant Vase】Both all sides and bottom of the vase is thickened design, compared with ordinary vase more thick and strong. This Large vase is sturdy, durable, leak-proof, and easy to clean perfect for Office Desk, and office decor.

【Fantastic cylinder vases】This Traditional vase is designed for showing off your flowers. Cylinder Vase looks beautiful and fashionable, brings your flowers a beautiful display. Our large glass vase can be used in varied occasions , like wedding, birthday, quincentenary, dinner party, etc. Make an impressive moment with this beautiful crystal glass vase.

【Best Gift Idea】This large glass vase be packed in a paper box with soft cushion, just need a simple decorative packing, it will be a perfect gift for your family and friends in specail day, like Christmas, Birthday etc.They come in different height and diameter. You will find one that fits your need.

【Improve Hands-On Ability】We can use these clear glass vases as wedding centerpieces, which can be paired with LED, transparent and colorful ice crystals and silk flowers to make the wedding more romantic.The glass flower vase worked great for pampas, roses and tulips, bamboo plant, hydrangea blooms, cotton balls, faux flower arrangement, amaryllis, gladiolus, decorate with sea shells, sand, rocks, water, beads.
